name: @maple/browser-session
description: Shared Maple browser session core — the sessionStorage-backed session record, the global session sink contract, session metadata rows, and the rrweb replay engine used by @maple-dev/browser and @maple-dev/effect-sdk. Private: consumers bundle it into their dists. The root export is rrweb-free; the replay engine lives behind ./replay so consumers can code-split it.
